game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Aventureros al Tren®** Ticket to Ride is a turn-based digital board game where players compete to build railway routes across a map. Players begin with a hand of train car cards (e.g., 4 cards) and destination tickets, interacting via tap controls to perform one of three actions per turn: draw two train car cards from a visible row or blind deck, draw new destination tickets (keeping at least one), or claim a route between two cities. To claim a route, players must play a set of matching colored train car cards equal to the route's length (e.g., 1-6 segments), then place their train pieces on that route. The game concludes when a player has three or fewer train pieces remaining, after which points are tallied for claimed routes, completed destination tickets, and the longest continuous railway, with the player achieving the highest score declared the winner.
game_info.description: Build railway routes across a simplified map to connect cities and fulfill destination tickets! Draw train car cards, claim routes by playing matching colored cards, and complete your destination tickets before your opponents. The game ends when any player has 3 or fewer train pieces left. Score points for claimed routes, completed destinations, and the longest continuous railway. Highest score wins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select cards/routes
Space: Confirm selection or perform action
Z: Cancel current action or go back
Shift: View destination tickets (hold during game)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates core game mechanics including drawing cards, claiming routes, and proper turn progression. Tests that the game responds correctly to automated inputs and state transitions work as expected.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Perform a series of random valid actions including drawing train cards and claiming short routes when possible. Validate that each action updates the game state correctly and the turn advances to the next player.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should progress through multiple turns without errors. Actions should successfully modify game state (cards drawn, routes claimed). The test validates that basic game flow works correctly.

TEST_1.expected: The game should progress through multiple turns without errors. Actions should successfully modify game state (cards drawn, routes claimed). The test validates that basic game flow works correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Winning strategy test that attempts to complete the game optimally. Focuses on efficiently claiming routes to complete destination tickets and maximize points while minimizing train pieces used.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize drawing cards of colors matching the shortest path routes. Claim routes strategically to complete destination tickets. Build the longest continuous path possible for bonus points. Aim to trigger game end conditions and achieve the highest score.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should successfully complete multiple destination tickets, claim a longest route bonus, and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state with a competitive final score. Validates that the win condition logic works correctly.
